details: repo_structure: memory_bank/ directory does not exist. MEMORY_BANK.md exists as a top-level file but not as a directory. Expected top-level dirs: src, scripts, reports, memory_bank, docs, validation, .cursor.

advisory: moltbot/ directory and scripts/run_molt_*.py still present in repo. MEMORYBANK_CLEANUP_DEPLOY_PROOF.md claims all Moltbot references removed, but moltbot/ code files persist. The no_clawdbot_moltbot check passes because existing legacy paths are excluded from reintroduction scanning.
